subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Lord of all worlds and Educator of all who dwell in the heavens and on earth! I beseech Thee by Thy Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا اله العالمین و مربی من فی السموات و الارضین اسئلک باسمک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
